name: Jaws Mustang Acquisition Corp
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on October 19, 2020 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses in any industry or sector. As of December 31, 2025, we had not commenced any operations. We will not generate any operating revenues until after the completion of a business combination, at the earliest.

catalysts.sentence: If we cannot complete a business combination by December 4, 2026 (assuming all extensions are exercised) because the transaction is still under review or because our business combination is ultimately prohibited by CFIUS or another U.S. government entity, we may be required to liquidate.
